title: CREATE PROJECT
body: A project holds Perspective views, Vision windows, scripts, named queries, and alarm pipelines.
code:
New Project:
  Name:        MyPlant
  Title:       My Plant SCADA
  Enabled:     true
  Inheritable: false (unless multi-project)

Project contains:
  ├ Perspective
  │   ├ Views (drag-and-drop UI)
  │   ├ Page Config
  │   └ Session Config
  ├ Vision (legacy)
  ├ Scripts (gateway/project/shared)
  ├ Named Queries
  ├ Alarm Pipelines
  └ Transaction Groups
key: Projects live on the gateway, not locally
Save and Publish to push changes live
mistakes: Many projects when one would do
